description: The Nike Air Zoom Pegasus 40 continues its legacy of reliability with a highly responsive, springy ride. Engineered with a single-layer mesh for enhanced breathability and the signature React technology, it provides high-energy return for long-distance runs. The dual Zoom Air units—one in the forefoot and one in the heel—deliver a supportive, cushioned feel that minimizes impact on joints. The redesigned midfoot strap offers a more secure fit for all foot shapes, ensuring stability from 5K sprints to full marathons.
ourTake: The Pegasus 40 remains the 'workhorse with wings' for a reason. It is incredibly versatile, making it a top-tier choice for both beginners and marathon veterans. The React foam is durable and doesn't bottom out over time. While it's perfect for neutral runners, those seeking heavy stability for overpronation might find it a bit too flexible, but for daily training, the value is unbeatable.
metaTitle: Nike Air Zoom Pegasus 40 - Road Running Shoes | Responsive Cushioning
metaDescription: Shop Nike Air Zoom Pegasus 40 Running Shoes. Features React foam, dual Zoom Air units, and breathable mesh. Best performance daily trainer available on Reticulo.

name: Nike Air Zoom Pegasus 40 Men's Road Running Shoes | Dual Zoom Air Units | Responsive React Foam | Breathable Engineered Mesh | Supportive Midfoot Lockdown
user_reviews: The cushioning is perfect for my 10k daily runs. The energy return in the forefoot is noticeable.
Finally a running shoe that doesn't feel hot after 30 minutes. The mesh upper is very breathable.
True to size and extremely comfortable right out of the box. No break-in period required.
Best versatile trainer. I use them for gym sessions and road running; they hold up great on both surfaces.
Significant improvement over the Pegasus 39 in terms of the midfoot fit. Feels much more secure during sprints.
Excellent durability. I've logged over 400km on these and the outsole tread still looks almost new.
The React foam gives a nice bounce without feeling too 'mushy'. Highly recommend for daily training.
